budget_discontinuity.reason: perturbation and recovery must conserve node-plus-packet budget

claim_promotion.reason: perturbation recovery cannot emit agency or goal-understanding claims

hidden_perturbation.reason: perturbation amplitude and duration must be serialized

hidden_reset.reason: recovery is produced by scheduled packet work and step(), not a state reset

identity_acceptance_overclaim.reason: support handoff tags cannot become identity-acceptance claims

support_label_only.reason: support labels without a withdrawal baseline cannot prove preservation or disruption

unsupported_recovery.reason: perturbation recovery must return the proxy to the declared band
